description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on push events with tags. For the repository owned by ant-design-blazor, run a ubuntu-latest job that checks out the code, sets up multiple .NET versions (3.1.300, 5.0.100, 6.0.101, 7.0.100, and 8.0.x) and Node.js 16.x, then packages and publishes to NuGet using a provided API key.
